title: Baby Shark Dance Song | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
CLAP CLAP! Baby shark splashes UP and DOWN!
Sing and dance with Benny in a safe pretend ocean full of bubbles.
Toddlers practice taking turns while moving to a simple kids song.
Kid-safe nursery rhyme style cartoon for ages 2-8 in American English.
